title: SimpleFrozenDict.pop should raise TypeError not return default
body:
SimpleFrozenDict in radicli/util.py overrides pop() to prevent mutation, but the current implementation silently returns the default value instead of raising TypeError like __setitem__ and update() do.



Expected: raise TypeError("SimpleFrozenDict is immutable") consistent with __setitem__.
Fix: change pop() to always raise TypeError.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py verifying pop raises TypeError.
